why.title: Why Choose Gelabert Homes Real Estate

item1.name: Maria Gomez
item1.text: I've been with Gelabert Homes for a year managing the rental of my apartment and it's completely hands-off for me. Real peace of mind and quick problem solving. 100% recommended.

item2.name: Carlos Ruiz
item2.text: We were looking for months until we found them. They showed us options that were a perfect fit and stayed with us through all the buying paperwork. Exceptional service.

item3.name: Laura Sanchez
item3.text: We rented with them a couple of months ago. Everything was clear from the start, no hidden clauses. Great communication and a very transparent contract.

notice.seo_title: Legal Notice | Gelabert Homes Real Estate
notice.title: Legal Notice

sections.title: 1. Identification data
sections.content: In compliance with the information duty provided in Article 10 of Law 34/2002, of July 11, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce, users of this website are informed of the following identifying data of the owner:
items: **Scope of action:** Malaga and Costa del Sol

sections.title: 2. Object
sections.content:
The purpose of this website is to offer information on the services provided by Gelabert Homes Real Estate, as well as to provide users with information on properties, real estate services, contact forms and professional communication channels.

Access, browsing and use of this website attributes the condition of user and implies full and unreserved acceptance of this Legal Notice.

sections.title: 3. Conditions of use
sections.content:
The user undertakes to use this website, its contents and services in accordance with the law, good faith, public order and this Legal Notice.

It is expressly prohibited to:
bullets: Perform activities that are illegal, unlawful or contrary to good faith and public order.
Damage, disable, overload or deteriorate the website or prevent its normal use.
Introduce viruses, malware or any other system likely to cause damage to the systems of the owner, its suppliers or third parties.
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to restricted areas, systems or databases.
Reproducer, copy, distribute, transform or make available to third parties the contents of the website without express authorization from the owner, except in cases legally permitted.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual and industrial property
sections.content:
All contents of the website, including, among others, texts, images, photographs, videos, designs, logos, brands, structure, appearance, source code and other elements, are owned by Gelabert Homes Real Estate or are used with sufficient authorization, and are protected by current regulations on intellectual and industrial property.

Reproduction, distribution, public communication, transformation, extraction, reuse or any other form of exploitation, total or partial, of the contents of this website without prior written authorization from the owner is prohibited, unless legally permitted.

Access to this website does not imply assignment, transmission, license or waiver of rights over said contents.

sections.title: 5. Exclusion of liability
sections.content:
Gelabert Homes Real Estate ensures that the information contained in this website is clear, updated and useful. However, it does not guarantee the absence of errors, the permanent updating of all contents nor the continuous availability of the website.

Gelabert Homes Real Estate will not be responsible, to the extent permitted by law, for damages that may derive from:
bullets: errors or omissions in the contents,
lack of availability of the website,
interruptions in operation,
presence of viruses, malware or malicious programs, despite having adopted reasonable technical measures to avoid them,
misuse of the website by the user,
decisions taken by the user based on the information published on the web.

sections.title: 6. External links
sections.content:
In the event that this website includes links to third-party pages, such links will have a purely informative or reference purpose.

Gelabert Homes Real Estate does not control nor assume any responsibility for the contents, policies, conditions of use or privacy practices of third-party websites.

sections.title: 7. Data protection
sections.content:
Personal data that may be collected through this website will be treated in accordance with the provisions of current regulations on personal data protection.

For more information, the user can consult the corresponding Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 8. Cookies
sections.content:
This website may use its own and third-party cookies for technical, analytical or personalization purposes.

To obtain detailed information about their use, the user can consult the corresponding Cookies Policy.

sections.title: 9. Commercial communications
sections.content: Gelabert Homes Real Estate will not send commercial communications by electronic means without having an adequate legal basis, in accordance with applicable legislation.

sections.title: 10. Modifications
sections.content: Gelabert Homes Real Estate reserves the right to modify, update or delete at any time and without prior notice the contents of the website, as well as this Legal Notice.

sections.title: 11. Applicable legislation and jurisdiction
sections.content:
The relationship between the owner of the website and the user will be governed by current Spanish legislation.

For any controversy that may derive from the access or use of this website, the parties will submit to the competent Courts and Tribunals in accordance with applicable regulations.

sections.title: 12. Contact
sections.content: For any query related to this website, you can contact:

privacy.seo_title: Privacy Policy | Gelabert Homes Real Estate
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.content: In compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679, General Data Protection Regulation, and Organic Law 3/2018, on the Protection of Personal Data and guarantee of digital rights, the user is informed that the personal data provided through this website, by email, phone, WhatsApp or other contact channels will be processed by:
items: **Scope of action:** Malaga and Costa del Sol

sections.title: 2. What data we process
sections.content: Gelabert Homes Real Estate may process, as the case may be, the following categories of personal data:
bullets: Identifying data: name, surname, ID card (DNI/NIE), passport.
Contact data: email, phone and, if applicable, postal address.
Data relating to the property: location, characteristics, price, images, documentation and details related to the operation.
Economic, labor and solvency data: employment contract, pay slips, tax return, work history and similar documentation necessary to evaluate applications or process operations.
Data derived from the commercial or contractual relationship.
Data contained in queries, emails, calls, forms or messages sent by the user.
Browsing data, as indicated in the Cookies Policy.

sections.title: 3. Purposes of processing
sections.content: Personal data will be processed for the following purposes:

subsections.title: a) Handling of inquiries
subsections.content: Handle requests for information, resolve inquiries and manage contact with users interested in properties or real estate services.

subsections.title: b) Management of real estate services
subsections.content: Manage services related to real estate brokerage, both in rental and purchase-sale, as well as the relationship with owners, buyers, sellers, lessors, lessees or interested parties.

subsections.title: c) Pre-contractual and contractual management
subsections.content: Process reservations, visits, offers, applications, deposits, contracts, annexes and other necessary actions before or during a real estate operation.

subsections.title: d) Solvency study
subsections.content: Request, review and assess identifying, economic and labor documentation to analyze the capacity and solvency of a person interested in a real estate operation.

subsections.title: e) Publication and promotion of properties
subsections.content: Manage the promotion and dissemination of properties on the own website and on real estate portals such as Idealista, Fotocasa, Pisos.com or other similar ones.

subsections.title: f) Commercial follow-up
subsections.content: Maintain communications related to properties of interest, real estate opportunities, visits, availability and professional follow-up of operations.

subsections.title: g) Compliance with legal obligations
subsections.content: Comply with legal, administrative, tax, accounting obligations or attend requirements from competent authorities.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis for processing
sections.content: The legal basis for the processing of personal data will be, as the case may be:
bullets: **The consent of the data subject**, when voluntarily providing their data or accepting specific treatments.
**The application of pre-contractual measures**, when processing is necessary to attend to a request from the data subject before formalizing an operation.
**The execution of a contractual relationship**, when processing is necessary to provide a service or manage a real estate operation.
**Compliance with legal obligations**, when there is an applicable regulatory obligation.
**Legitimate interest**, when necessary for the professional management of the activity, the security of the website or the defense against claims, always within legal limits.

sections.title: 5. Mandatory or optional nature of the data
sections.content:
The data requested in forms or management processes may be mandatory or voluntary. Mandatory fields will be necessary to attend to the request, manage a visit, study an application or process an operation.

Refusal to provide certain data may prevent the correct provision of the service or the handling of the user's request.

sections.title: 6. Data retention
sections.content:
Personal data will be kept for the time necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected and, subsequently, for the legally required periods or those necessary to attend to possible responsibilities.

In general:
bullets: Inquiry data will be kept for the time necessary for its management and reasonable follow-up.
Data linked to real estate operations will be kept while the pre-contractual or contractual relationship exists and for the applicable legal periods.
Solvency documentation will be kept for the time strictly necessary to evaluate the application and, if applicable, during the duration of the relationship and the periods of responsibility.
Data for commercial communications will be kept until the user withdraws their consent or objects to the processing.
Data subject to legal obligation will be kept for the periods required by the corresponding regulations.

sections.title: 7. Data recipients
sections.content: Personal data may be communicated or accessible, when necessary, to:
bullets: owners, lessors, lessees, buyers, sellers or interested parties involved in the operation,
real estate portals and property publication platforms,
agencies, consultancies, law firms, notaries, registries, financial or insurance entities, where applicable,
technological and service providers acting as data processors,
public administrations, courts, tribunals and competent authorities when there is a legal obligation.
sections.note: Personal data will not be sold to third parties.

sections.title: 8. International data transfers
sections.content: In case of using technological tools, platforms or providers located outside the European Economic Area or with infrastructures located outside said space, Gelabert Homes Real Estate will adopt the adequate guarantees required by current regulations.

sections.title: 9. User rights
sections.content: The user can exercise the following rights at any time:
bullets: Right of access.
Right of rectification.
Right of erasure (deletion).
Right to object.
Right to restriction of processing.
Right to data portability, where applicable.
Right to withdraw consent at any time.
Right not to be subject to automated decisions, where applicable.
sections.exercise:
To exercise these rights, the user may send a request to: **info@gelaberthomes.es**

The request must identify the applicant and clearly indicate the right they wish to exercise. When necessary, reasonable additional information may be requested to verify the applicant's identity.

sections.title: 10. Right to claim before the control authority
sections.content: If the user considers that their data is not being processed in accordance with current regulations, they may file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency.

sections.title: 11. Commercial communications
sections.content:
Gelabert Homes Real Estate may send commercial communications related to properties, services or news in the sector when there is user consent or a sufficient legal basis.

The user may object to the sending of commercial communications at any time by request addressed to info@gelaberthomes.es.

sections.title: 12. Social networks, messaging and external portals
sections.content:
Gelabert Homes Real Estate may use social networks, instant messaging and real estate portals as communication and promotion channels.

User interaction through these platforms will also be subject to the conditions and privacy policies of each of them.

sections.title: 13. Security
sections.content:
Gelabert Homes Real Estate adopts reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against loss, unauthorized access, alteration or improper treatment.

However, the user should be aware that absolute security on the Internet cannot be guaranteed.

sections.title: 14. Minors
sections.content: This website and the services of Gelabert Homes Real Estate are not specifically addressed to minors. In case of providing data of minors, it must be done by whoever holds their legal representation, when legally appropriate.

sections.title: 15. Cookies
sections.content: This website may use its own and third-party cookies. For more information, the user can consult the corresponding Cookies Policy.

sections.title: 16. Changes to this policy
sections.content: Gelabert Homes Real Estate reserves the right to modify this Privacy Policy to adapt it to new legislation, criteria of control authorities or changes in its activity.

sections.title: 17. Contact
sections.content: For any query related to this Privacy Policy, you can contact at:

cookies.seo_title: Cookies Policy | Gelabert Homes Real Estate
cookies.title: Cookies Policy

sections.title: 1. What are cookies
sections.content: Cookies are small text files that a website can store on the user's device when visiting a page. They serve to allow or facilitate navigation, remember preferences, obtain statistical information or personalize certain contents, among other purposes.

sections.title: 2. What types of cookies this website may use
sections.content: This website may use its own and third-party cookies, according to their purpose:

subsections.title: a) Technical or necessary cookies
subsections.content:
These are essential to allow navigation through the website and the use of its basic functions, such as controlling traffic, identifying the session, remembering integrated elements or managing technical preferences.

These cookies do not require consent when limited to strictly technical or necessary purposes.

subsections.title: b) Personalization cookies
subsections.content: They allow remembering certain characteristics or preferences of the user, such as language, type of browser or regional configuration, when applicable.

subsections.title: c) Analysis or measurement cookies
subsections.content: They allow quantifying the number of users and performing statistical analysis on the use of the website, in order to improve the services offered and the navigation experience.

subsections.title: d) Advertising or marketing cookies
subsections.content:
They allow managing advertising spaces or monitoring user behavior to show relevant ads adapted to their browsing habits.

These cookies will only be used if the user expressly accepts them.

sections.title: 3. Legal basis for the use of cookies
sections.content:
The legal basis for the use of technical or necessary cookies is the legitimate interest of the owner in enabling the correct functioning of the website.

The legal basis for the use of analytical, non-necessary personalization, advertising or marketing cookies will be the user's consent, granted through the corresponding cookie management system or banner.

sections.title: 4. Our own and third-party cookies
sections.content:
This website may use both our own cookies and third-party cookies.

Third-party cookies are those sent to the user's device from a domain or equipment managed by an entity other than the owner of the website, such as analytics services, maps, embedded videos, chat, social networks or advertising.

sections.title: 5. Consent management
sections.content:
When accessing this website, the user can accept, reject or configure the use of non-necessary cookies through the system enabled for this purpose.

The user may modify their choice at any time from the cookie configuration panel or system available on the website, if enabled.

Withdrawal of consent will not affect the lawfulness of cookie use based on consent prior to its withdrawal.

sections.title: 6. Retention
sections.content:
Cookies will be kept for the time essential to fulfill their purpose. In the case of cookies based on consent, said consent must be able to be withdrawn by the user at any time.

The specific duration periods may vary depending on the type of cookie and the corresponding provider.

sections.title: 7. How to disable or delete cookies from the browser
sections.content:
The user can allow, block or delete the cookies installed on their device by configuring the options of the browser they use.

Disabling certain cookies may affect the correct functioning of some parts of the website.

sections.title: 8. Possible future use of cookies
sections.content:
Gelabert Homes Real Estate may use technical and, if applicable, analytical, personalization or advertising cookies depending on the tools integrated into the web.

In case of using non-necessary cookies, user consent will be previously obtained in accordance with applicable regulations.

sections.title: 9. Cookies Policy Updates
sections.content: Gelabert Homes Real Estate reserves the right to modify this Cookies Policy to adapt it to regulatory, technical or functional changes of the website.

sections.title: 10. Contact
sections.content: For any query related to this Cookies Policy, you can contact at:

cookie_banner.title: Your privacy matters to us
cookie_banner.description: This website uses our own and third-party cookies for technical, analytical and personalization purposes. You can accept all cookies, reject them or provide your consent according to your preferences. For more information, consult our <0>Cookies Policy</0>.
